name: Amo View
privacyPolicy:
Amo View — Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 20 May 2026

1. Who We Are

Amo View is a streaming, live-events, and creator-monetisation platform built for the East African market. The mobile apps (Android & iOS) and our backend at app.amoview.com are operated by DavinTech Labs. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and the rights you have over it.

2. Information We Collect

We collect only the data we need to run the service:

  • Account & identity: first name, last name, username, email, phone number, avatar, gender, date of birth, country, preferred currency, and bio (if you choose to add one).
  • Authentication: a salted password hash (never the plain password) or a sign-in identifier from Google / Apple if you used social login.
  • Identity verification (optional): if you request a verified creator badge, we collect a legal name, a government-issued ID image, an optional ID-back image, and a selfie. These are reviewed only by our internal moderators and are never shared externally.
  • Creator & content data: the videos, audio, eBooks, livestreams, playlists, and Waves you upload, plus the titles, descriptions, thumbnails, categories, and pricing settings you attach to them.
  • Activity: watch history, likes, comments, subscriptions, saves, watch-later items, search queries, second-by-second consumption ranges (used for billing and analytics), and the device(s) you sign in from.
  • Wallet & transactions: wallet balance, top-ups, payouts, withdrawals, purchases, and a ledger of every credit / debit. Payments flow through PawaPay (mobile money) — we never see your PIN or full card details.
  • Messaging: chat threads, messages, and media you share through in-app DMs and broadcast channels.
  • Device & technical data: a device fingerprint (model, OS version, app build), FCM push-notification token, IP address, and crash / error logs.
  • Live-streaming media: when you join or host a live session, your audio / video is relayed through our streaming partner (100ms / LiveKit SFU) for the duration of the session only.

3. How We Use Your Data

  • To create your account, sign you in, and keep the service running.
  • To deliver the videos, audio, books, and live sessions you ask for and pay out creators correctly.
  • To route payments and mobile-money top-ups through our payment partner.
  • To send push notifications you have opted in to (new content from subscriptions, chat messages, live invitations, payout updates).
  • To detect abuse, fraud, and content that violates our Community Guidelines.
  • To comply with applicable law and respond to lawful requests from authorities.

4. Who We Share Data With

We do not sell your personal data. We share only what is needed to provide the service:

  • Firebase (Google): push-notification delivery and crash reporting.
  • Bunny CDN / Cloudflare: hosting and streaming of your uploaded videos, audio, and eBooks.
  • 100ms / LiveKit: real-time audio / video for live sessions and calls.
  • PawaPay: mobile-money deposits and withdrawals.
  • OpenAI, Google Gemini, and Groq: for in-app AI features (summarisation, Q&A over content). Only the content you submit to the AI is sent, never your account credentials.
  • Authorities: when we are legally required to (e.g. valid court order).

5. How We Protect Your Data

  • Encryption in transit: all traffic between the app and app.amoview.com is served over HTTPS / TLS.
  • Encryption at rest: auth tokens are stored in the device's secure enclave (Android Keystore / iOS Keychain) via flutter_secure_storage. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt.
  • Access control: internal admin actions are role-gated and logged in an audit trail.
  • Signed media URLs: paid videos, audio, and eBooks are served via short-lived, IP-locked signed URLs.

6. Data Retention

We keep account-level data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, we permanently remove your User profile, your Channel, and your FCM push tokens within 24 hours. Domain rows kept for audit / financial-compliance reasons (transaction ledgers, content ownership records for payout reconciliation) are retained for up to 7 years and detached from your personal identity.

7. Your Rights

  • Access & edit: view and edit your profile from Settings > Edit profile.
  • Export: request a copy of your data by emailing support@amoview.com.
  • Block / unblock: manage blocked users in Settings > Privacy & Security.
  • Revoke devices: sign out other devices from Privacy & Security > Manage devices.
  • Clear watch history: available in Privacy & Security.
  • Delete your account: use the in-app option in Settings > Privacy & Security, or this Account Deletion page — no email required.

8. Children

Amo View is not directed to children under 13. If we discover an account that belongs to a child under 13, we will delete it.

9. Contact

Questions about this policy? Email support@amoview.com.

10. Changes

If we make material changes to this policy, we will notify you in the app and update the date at the top of this page.
terms:
Amo View — Terms of Service

Last Updated: 20 May 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By creating an Amo View account or using the Amo View apps, you agree to these Terms and to our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old to create an account. To monetize content, withdraw funds, or unlock a verified creator badge, you must be 18 years old or older and complete identity verification.

3. Your Account

  • You are responsible for keeping your password confidential and for everything that happens under your account.
  • Notify us immediately at support@amoview.com if you believe your account has been accessed without your permission.
  • One person, one account. Accounts may not be shared or sold.

4. Content You Upload

  • You retain ownership of the content you upload. You grant Amo View a worldwide, royalty-free licence to host, stream, encode, and distribute your content within the Amo View apps and websites — only as needed to operate the service.
  • You must have all necessary rights to the content you upload. Do not upload material that infringes copyright, contains hate speech, sexually exploits minors, glorifies violence, or violates our Community Guidelines.
  • We use automated tooling and human moderators to review content. We may remove content or restrict accounts that violate these Terms, with or without notice.

5. Wallet, Payments, and Monetization

  • Top-ups are processed through PawaPay. Amounts shown are in the currency you select at sign-up (defaults to TZS for Tanzanian users).
  • Creators earn an 80% share of net revenue on paid views, paid unlocks, gifts, and 1:1 bookings. The exact split for any given product is shown to you before publishing.
  • Withdrawals are subject to identity verification (KYC) and minimum-balance thresholds set on the platform settings page in the web admin.
  • Disputed transactions: contact support@amoview.com within 14 days of the transaction.

6. Prohibited Conduct

  • No scraping, reverse-engineering, or automated abuse of the API.
  • No bypassing paywalls, watermarks, or signed-URL protections.
  • No re-uploading other creators' content without permission.
  • No spam, phishing, or harassment of other users.

7. Live Streaming & Chat

You are responsible for what you say and show in live sessions, broadcast channels, and direct messages. Live content can be reported and reviewed by our moderation team. Severe violations result in immediate account suspension.

8. Service Availability

We aim for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. We may add, modify, or discontinue features at any time. We will give reasonable notice for changes that materially affect creators' ability to earn.

9. Termination & Account Deletion

You may delete your account at any time from Settings > Privacy & Security > Delete account, or via the Account Deletion page on this Trust Center. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms; in those cases, unpaid creator earnings tied to disputed activity may be withheld pending review.

10. Disclaimer & Liability

The service is provided “as is.” To the maximum extent allowed by law, Amo View is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the United Republic of Tanzania. Any dispute will be resolved in the courts of Dar es Salaam unless local consumer-protection law gives you the right to use your own courts.

12. Contact

Questions about these Terms? Email support@amoview.com.

name: ADM Ministry
privacyPolicy:
Privacy Policy for ADM Ministry

Effective Date: 01 March 2026

1. Introduction

ADM Ministry Platform is dedicated to protecting the privacy of our members, staff, and leadership. This policy outlines how we collect, store, and secure your personal and spiritual data.

2. Information We Collect

We collect information necessary to facilitate church operations and communication:

  • Identification: Full name, gender, marital status, and baptism records.
  • Contact: Phone numbers and email addresses for ministry alerts and OTP verification.
  • Ministry Data: Assigned branches, departments (e.g., Choir, Ushers), and leadership roles.
  • Financial Records: Tracking of tithes, offerings, and pledges for ministry accounting.

3. Data Usage & Security

Your data is used strictly for internal ministry purposes, such as attendance tracking and financial reporting. We implement the following security measures:

  • Encryption: All passwords and sensitive tokens are cryptographically secured.
  • Access Control: Data is only visible to authorized personnel like Pastors and Treasurers.
  • Infrastructure: We use secure hosting and trusted SMS gateways for all communications.

4. Your Rights & Account Deletion

You have the right to review your data or request its removal. To permanently erase your profile and deactivate your account, please use the Account Deletion tool found in the app settings or on this compliance hub. Once authenticated, your personally identifiable information will be removed from our active databases.

5. Contact Information

For questions regarding your data, please contact your local Branch Administrator or the Ministry Head Office.
terms:
Terms of Service

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing the ADM Ministry Platform, you agree to abide by these terms. This platform is provided for the sole purpose of supporting church administration and member spiritual growth.

2. User Accounts & Security

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. Any activity performed under your account is your responsibility. You must immediately notify an Admin if you suspect unauthorized access.

3. Code of Conduct

Users must interact with the platform in a manner consistent with ministry values. Unauthorized attempts to access data outside of your assigned role or branch are strictly prohibited.

4. Administrative Responsibilities

Leaders and Administrators (Pastors, Treasurers, etc.) agree to handle member data with the highest level of confidentiality. Misuse of financial records or personal member information is grounds for immediate termination of access and potential disciplinary action.

5. Service Limitations

We strive for 100% uptime but do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features necessary for the security and efficiency of the ministry.
